steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The researchers previously argued that Bronze Age societies were ruled by men.

The finding is attempting to “persuade” them to [blank] that women may have also held leadership roles.

The word persuade is the decisive signal—it indicates the researchers are being convinced to shift or expand their original position.

steps.title: Match the signal to the answer
steps.content:
Concede means to admit or acknowledge, which is exactly what happens when you persuade someone to accept a new claim.

The other three choices don't work because they either don't fit accepting a belief (waive and require don't mean “to admit”) or contradict the evidence's purpose (refute means disprove, not support).

That confirms B is correct.
